career_angle: If you're building stateful serverless apps, test Modal Dicts against Redis/Momento for your actual access patterns before buying the hype. Serverless KV is a real gap worth watching.

factors.rationale: First-party blog announcing own product -- this is a press release dressed as a tech post
No benchmarks, no latency numbers, no comparison to alternatives. 'Unlimited' with zero stress-test data
It's a shipped product feature -- you can sign up and test the claims yourself
Company announcing its own product improvement. Maximum commercial incentive to oversell
Serverless KV is a legitimate infrastructure need. No independent validation of the 'unlimited' claim
'Infinity' is the opposite of specific. Real engineering posts show limits, tradeoffs, and failure modes
Modal has delivered solid infrastructure before and has credibility in the serverless space
